calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: grant motion to compel. No opposition filed. Grant motion for reasonable attorney's fees and costs in amount of $340 to be paid by Defendant (CCP 2023.030). No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Not reported
